title: tenant-shell script validates container is running
evidence: All 5 TC-034 tests passed in 9ms. Full suite: 448/448 tests passed across 68 files. Tests verified: (1) script exists at scripts/tenant-shell.sh, (2) shebang #!/bin/bash present, (3) contains `docker exec -it --user agent`, (4) validates TENANT_ID argument with `if [ -z "${TENANT_ID}" ] → exit 1`, (5) validates container running via `docker inspect` before exec.
